channel.title: Ens on Read Write
channel.description: Recent content in Ens on Read Write

item.title: About
item.description:
Hello,

I am a developer specializing in Backend positions.
I have a primary interest in DevOps and Big Data, but I’m also open to learning about other fields without hesitation.
I make an effort to record what I learn since it’s not always easy to remember everything I’ve studied.

If you notice any inaccuracies or have any questions, please feel free to leave a comment anytime.
If you need to reach me personally, you can click on the email icon on the left.

Thank you.
